name: INTRAMEDULLARY OSTEOSCLEROSIS
definition: rare condition increased bone formation within medullary cavity of long bones of lower

demographics.Location: uni- / bilateral in ≥ 1 long bone of lower extremity; most frequently in tibia

dominant_finding: osteosclerosis limited to medullary cavity with minimal / no cortical thickening
distribution: uni- / bilateral in ≥ 1 long bone of lower extremity; most frequently in tibia
discriminating_features: osteosclerosis limited to medullary cavity with minimal / no cortical thickening

general: osteosclerosis limited to medullary cavity with minimal / no cortical thickening
